properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 89/17
NORWEGIAN SEA
LIVE TORPEDO FIRINGS 140800 TO 251530 UTC AUG
BY GERMAN NAVY IN FOLLOWING AREAS:
AREA 1:
AN AREA DEFINED BY A CIRCKLE WITH 
ORIGO 70-10.00N 015-00.00E
RADIUS 10NM

AREA 2: 
AN AREA DEFINED BY A CIRCKLE WITH
ORIGO 68-45.00N 002-15.00E
RADIUS 10NM
AREAS ARE DANGEROUS FOR NAVIGATION
